transcript.text:
(Do you know which kind of taste gets you addicted the most...?)
(It's the one you're familiar with...)
(The familiar taste)
(So we'll be showing you today...)
(How a big eater...)
(Gets addicted to the "familiar taste" for real)
(You wouldn't believe it even if you saw it...)
(So let's just dive in to find out how things went down that day...)
(Today's must-visit restaurant)
Hello everyone
(Today's mukbang will take place at the driver's restaurant!) I'm here at a driver's restaurant today!
This place has been in business for 40 years
And it's quite popular for the taste of bulgogi, and the reasonable price
(Let's get to it) So I'll head inside right away
(Even the appearance looks promising...)
Hello!

(2:55 P.M.) It's almost 3 P.M. now
which is usually
a slack time for restaurants, but there are still so many people in here
And I can tell that this is a must-visit restaurant
because most of the customers
are in the older age group
They say if elders like it, it's a guaranteed place for sure...
(Found the menu!) The menu's over there!
3,000 won for soju and rice wine?!
(And the other menus are cheap as well!)
(Time to order)
(+ 2 pork bulgogi, 2 beef bulgogi, 2 stir-fried squids)
(+ 1 soybean paste stew, 1 soft tofu stew with seafood)
(+ 1 beef bulgogi inside the earthen pot)
(Everything on the menu) That will be the order
So it's a take-out, right?

(Nope, she'll eat it all) I'm going to eat here all by myself
Tzuyang?!!
(Well, if it's Tzuyang, it shouldn't be a problem...)
(Tzuyang can really eat a lot)
This customer knows you
(A celebrity at our restaurant...?) He wants to take a picture with you, my gosh
(I'm just grateful for all the support you give me...)
Thank you
You're so pretty
(Thank you, have a nice day!)
(Here comes the stir-fried squid with pork!) So that's how it's served!
(The red color makes it look so appetizing...)
(And the signature menu, pork bulgogi is here too!)
(Hold on a sec...!) Thank you
(Tteokbokki for a side dish?!) We get tteokbokki as well?
(How lovely...!) I'll get a bite of it first

This will be perfect with rice!
Thank you
(On-the-spot beef bulgogi comes with broth and veggies)
Whoa, thank you!
(And must menus for Korean Table d'hote, soybean paste stew & soft tofu stew!)
(Bulgogi in an earthen pot for the last!) Thank you
- Be careful, it's hot - Okay!
How can you eat all of it...?
(That was for 1 person?)
How can she eat all of them?
(Really? Just one person????)
And does the stew come with the bulgogi?
(Yeap, it's one of the free side dishes!)
(And in you go, bulgogi...)
Let's get some stew while it's being cooked
Here's the bowl of rice

(There you have it)
Thanks for the food!
(Stir-fried squid and pork / On-the-spot beef bulgogi) They have to be cooked on the spot
So I'll try this, after this,
after this and that
(Even rice alone tastes great...)
Now this stew is the highlight
Oh, it's great!
I thought I would need more seasoning
But the saltiness
is just right, and...
It's really great...!
The flavor is very rich as well
It's a typical example of...
A delicious soybean stew!
Really loving the rich taste

(Keeps saying it's great like a broken record LOLOL) Oh my, this is great stuff!
(No wonder it's only 3,000 won) You can't go missing soju on this one
(Another day of resisting alcohol...) But I drove here today so it's a pass for today
(While she's enjoying the stew, the bulgogi is being cooked nicely...)
Let's get a bite of the soft tofu stew
That's quite a lot actually!
(A little attention plz...!)
Every dish is delicious here
(It's about time to flip them over...)
(No, please...!) Oh, it getting burnt!
(Was so into the stew) It's burnt a bit
(But it's still in the safe zone)
Looks so pleasing to the eyes!
It's great that I'm having Korean food today
Even the broth is legit!!
(You won't be able to stop salivating from this...)

(And the real mukbang begins) Thanks for the food!
So excited to be here because everyone said the food is great
(Automatically picking up the veggies...)
Well, to begin with, the price is great
Well,
it's not like the dish has a unique kick to it
(A typical example of a Korean Set Menu) but it really sticks to the basics
(+ Pork bulgogi)
(+ Ssamjang*) *Dipping sauce
(+ Garlic)
(Enjoying a proper dish in a proper way)
(And stew for the perfect finish...!) And a bit of rice at the end...
Whoa! It's great!
Let's get a piece
on top of the rice
(And a bite of soft tofu stew)

(This just...feels like heaven...) Wow! That was great
(She remained speechless for a long time, so we had to fast-forward it a bit...)
(A must-have ingredient for earthen pot bulgogi...!) Glass noodles are a must for this!
(Getting pretty warm in here) It's really hot today! I'm sweating now
Whoa, that was great
I'll mix the rest with the rice!
(We all know how good it is...)
(Cleared the first bowl!)
Ma'am, can I get another bowl of rice
Thank you!
The bulgogi was great
Wish I could have more
(Waiting for their turn) But I have to finish the other ones
(I'll be with you in a sec...) So I'll say goodbye for now
(Changing the menu) Thank you
How come you don't gain weight from eating like this...?

(It's not like someone starved her for days...)
(Never seen someone hold up the earthen pot like that though...)
(Cleared the bulgogi served in an earthen pot!) Mmm! That was great
(And the stir-fry is being cooked nicely
Looks delicious!
(The stir-fry is done!) It looks so delicious
And the amount is great too
Let's try it without other toppings
Whoa, this is good too
The seasoning will go perfectly with the rice
Considering the fact that every dish is above par,
(Tzuyang approved) I think the chefs here are really skilled
(Hunting for the meat and the squid!)
The seasoning is just out of this world
(The ultimate combo...) This will be just perfect
(+ Squid) Let's get a piece

I can't stop complimenting the seasoning
The more you boil it, the better it gets
(How could you?!) Forgot to wrap it
(Two at a time) Got some squid
and some green onion
(Looking very serious)
(Nom-nom...)
(And a regular took a seat next to Tzuyang...)
(How can she eat all that...?)
Is this going out on TV?
It's a mukbang for YouTube
How can you fit all that when you're so slim?!
(Couldn't agree more...)
I'm worried that your stomach might get upset...!
Although this is a driver's restaurant,
it's not just the drivers here

So many people in different age groups
come here and enjoy the food
which proves that this is a must-visit place!!
So I've finished the stir-fry dishes
Let's add some seasoning for the final bite
(Cleared the stir-fry dishes!)
Ma'am!
(+ Another bowl of rice)
(Changing the menu again) Thank you
(Glance)
(Know what...?) I should've known better
(The regular customer added garlic to bulgogi) They're cooking garlic inside it
(Only the regulars would know it...) I should've done that...
(Found carrots) For carrots...
It's a pass
(So long carrots...)

(And the bulgogi started to boil...!)
This is also a large portion
(Broth first!)
(Boiling down the beef bulgogi...)
It's all boiled down now
I prefer eating it this way
So I've put the heat on max level
(You should give it a try like how she eats it!) This is how you eat it, folks
All the broth has seeped in
(Bearing the heat...)
Just cool down already...!!
(Eating soft tofu stew in between)
(And cleared that one as well!)
(4 cans of soda? Is this real?)
(It...happens all the time...)
(Eyes glued)

(Still fighting with the hot temperature)
I think it'll be great for you to try out other dishes than bulgogi!
(Let's get them all out)
And the bowl is completely packed with rice
That's just amazing...
(What an amazing girl...)
(Cleared all the earthen pot dishes!!)
Now to the finale!
(Saving the best part for the last)
(Always plans very well when it comes to food...)
(And of course, smudge is a must LOL)
The last bite
(Cleared all the menu!)
(My goodness)
Thanks for the great food!
(But how did this happen though...?)

You must be blessed from the heavens...LOLOL
Can't believe she ate all that! LOL
(Taking a seat right next to Tzuyang...)
(Can I get a picture please?!)
(And there's another memorable moment...!)
Hope you enjoy your meal!
(Hope you visit this place again!)
So thanks for
another great meal!
